learnings: Both achieve 100% on medium complexity — need harder problems to differentiate
Maina 25% faster despite running verify+review+slop (3 extra safety checks)
Token usage roughly equal on tier 2 (gap narrowed from tier 1)
Spec Kit produces 4 structured artifacts (constitution, spec, plan, tasks) — more documentation
Verification is maina's unique value — Spec Kit has no equivalent quality gate
Tier 3 should have ambiguous requirements or multi-module architecture to force real bugs
